notes: Manual metadata-only review of the first real Objaverse shard queue. Decisions are intentionally conservative and meant to seed the first geometry-backed prototype.

decisions.title: Earmes Lounge Chair
decisions.reason: Strong category match and no obvious metadata red flags.

decisions.title: Leather and Fabric Sofa
decisions.reason: Promising sofa candidate with useful descriptive metadata and no immediate quality red flag.

decisions.title: table 70s
decisions.reason: Clear coffee-table semantics and plausible furniture-specific description.

decisions.title: Bookshelf
decisions.reason: Simple but plausible storage candidate for the first normalization pass.

decisions.title: nightstand
decisions.reason: Good side-table proxy for a first living-room furniture prototype.

decisions.title: new_Armchair
decisions.reason: Plausible but metadata is generic; inspect geometry before accepting.

decisions.title: armchair
decisions.reason: Plausible fallback candidate, but metadata is too generic for immediate promotion.

decisions.title: Bookcase
decisions.reason: Useful category coverage, but low-detail risk remains until geometry inspection.

decisions.title: Sofa
decisions.reason: Potentially useful scanned furniture, but likely cleanup-heavy.

decisions.title: Shihba - SSC210
decisions.reason: Interesting sofa candidate, but scanned classical-set origin may make normalization costly.

decisions.title: CLASSIC - MODERN - LEATHER SOFA
decisions.reason: Visually plausible from metadata, but description suggests mixed intended uses.

decisions.title: Clients_3_Sofa_2 - CSM239
decisions.reason: Could be useful, but very high triangle count and scan-heavy origin suggest extra cleanup burden.

decisions.title: Sofa Kenni_Pawsome
decisions.reason: Name is unusual; inspect actual geometry before promoting.

decisions.title: Диван
decisions.reason: Lower-priority sofa candidate due to weak/noisy metadata relative to stronger alternatives.

decisions.title: Sofa
decisions.reason: Low-detail generic sofa candidate; not strong enough for the first realism-oriented prototype.

decisions.title: Projeto Sala
decisions.reason: Likely room-scene export rather than a clean isolated furniture asset.
